title: Vegapunk Reveals the Sinking World
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Bonney, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Nusjuro, Saturn as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I believe that I will soon be executed for my transgressions...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this message will be programmed to broadcast...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can't be! He was all over the papers just this morning!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They said he's being held hostage by the straw hat pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't just die, we just learned up so we can surpass you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Hey! Hey! What's the big idea with this massive broadcast?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is he trying to kill print media!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to make one thing clear, and I pray you understand this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please do not assume that the ones who strike me down are evil...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Regardless of who they seem to be.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I do not intend to discuss right and wrong here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am not qualified to judge such things... and I do not know nearly enough about him in any case...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Step aside! I have no time to deal with vermin like you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That is quite an audacious hypothesis.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The woman Akainu let slip through his fingers.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: He's one of the five elders?!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
